item.title: When AI Starts Predicting the Next Scientific Question
item.description: AI may not just accelerate science. It may begin to shape which questions emerge first.A new study in Nature Machine Intelligence suggests AI may do more than summarise knowledge or accelerate discove

item.title: Why Real Breakthroughs Are Not One Person’s Victory
item.description: Real breakthroughs are often not one person’s victory. Discovery often emerges in parallel.What EDM Reveals About the Twin Structure of Scientific InnovationEDM is not just a better academic metric. I

item.title: Why 156,000 Citations Can Be Worth Less Than 18,700 in Biopharma
item.description: The figure reflects the paper’s methodology and sample construction; citation values are most comparable within each sub-sample.A new working paper suggests that markets often reward narrative clarity
